rows.label: tev001795_MSG0001
rows.name:
Okay, let's see... So my first
advisory session was about the
Bias's cultural heritage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0002
rows.name:
The next concerned the Orphe's food
reserves, followed by the Nopon discussing
their special education program.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0003
rows.name: Oh, [ST:playername ]! I'm sorry. I didn't see you there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0004
rows.name:
I was a little preoccupied
with my own thoughts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0005
rows.name:
I've been awfully busy lately,
now that I have xenoforms coming
to speak with me as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev001795_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Himeri whether it has been hard not having Ornela around.

rows.label: tev001795_JNK0020
rows.name: Advise

rows.label: tev001795_SEL0021
rows.name: Suggest that Himeri make a numbered list of priorities.

rows.label: tev001795_JNK0030
rows.name: Invite

rows.label: tev001795_SEL0031
rows.name: Invite Himeri to visit your pet at the Home.

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0006
rows.name:
Not having Ornela around certainly
hasn't made things any easier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0007
rows.name:
But I started all this myself, so I
should be able to continue it by myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0008
rows.name:
Really, this is exactly
the way things should be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0009
rows.name:
And since I decided to proceed
using my own methods, it hasn't
been that bad at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0010
rows.name: You're probably right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0011
rows.name:
Some of these issues will take
a fair amount of time to fix.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0012
rows.name:
And some are certainly
more urgent than others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0013
rows.name:
I should prioritize the ones that
are the most urgent, followed by
those which can be solved quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0014
rows.name: Thank you for the advice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0015
rows.name:
Being able to organize it all like that
makes me feel a little bit better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0016
rows.name:
Er, while I have you here,
can I tell you something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0017
rows.name: That's very kind of you, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0018
rows.name:
While I appreciate the offer, I'm afraid I
won't be able to take you up on it at the
moment. I still have so much work to do![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0019
rows.name:
When I need a break, however, you can
be sure I'll be there with bells on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0020
rows.name:
A little time with your pet should
be just the thing to lift my
spirits and reinvigorate me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0021
rows.name:
But if you have a moment, I'd like
to bend your ear about something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0022
rows.name:
As you know, we humans have
received a great many benefits
from our unions with the xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0023
rows.name:
I would like to repay them for
all the knowledge and technology
that they've given us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0024
rows.name:
By talking with them, I've come
to learn a lot about their ways,
and also taught them about ours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0025
rows.name:
The closer our peoples become, the better
the world we can create together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0026
rows.name: I firmly believe that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0027
rows.name:
You in particular have become
especially popular with the xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0028
rows.name:
And while I want to continue being
of help to you, I'd also like to see
what I can accomplish by myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001795_MSG0029
rows.name:
I'm really excited to show you what
I can do. Just you wait and see![ST:wait ]
